response.global_analysis: The audio consists of English dialogue from Hololive VTubers with occasional Japanese phrases and hardcoded Japanese subtitles. The reference JSON indicates no vocal songs are present. I am transcribing the spoken dialogue and counting, using the on-screen text to confirm spellings and result numbers. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the vocal audio waveform, and gaps in speech are reflected with silence in the subtitles.

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: Yes! That's my goal!
subtitles.english: Yes! That's my goal!

subtitles.original: That's what I'm talking about!
subtitles.english: That's what I'm talking about!

subtitles.original: Yeah, that's 24! And I didn't lose the cup once.
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's 24! And I didn't lose the cup once.

subtitles.original: You sure did. Maybe this cup was taped on.
subtitles.english: You sure did. Maybe this cup was taped on.

subtitles.original: Maybe there was tape! I think she's cheating.
subtitles.english: Maybe there was tape! I think she's cheating.

subtitles.original: Is it not? Superglue? Was it superglue?
subtitles.english: Is it not? Superglue? Was it superglue?

subtitles.original: Put it on IRyS's head. Put it on...
subtitles.english: Put it on IRyS's head. Put it on...

subtitles.original: Let's really test it. Let's really get in there.
subtitles.english: Let's really test it. Let's really get in there.

subtitles.original: You're gonna use me as the test? Yeah.
subtitles.english: You're gonna use me as the test? Yeah.

subtitles.original: It's Zeta's turn. Zeta, birthday girl!
subtitles.english: It's Zeta's turn. Zeta, birthday girl!

subtitles.original: Directly right in the center of your head...
subtitles.english: Directly right in the center of your head...

subtitles.original: ...so that it's less likely to fall off.
subtitles.english: ...so that it's less likely to fall off.

subtitles.original: This is like the best birthday ever.
subtitles.english: This is like the best birthday ever.

subtitles.original: Oh, yay! I'm glad.
subtitles.english: Oh, yay! I'm glad.

subtitles.original: Now then, are you ready?
subtitles.english: Now then, are you ready?

subtitles.original: Three, two, one, start!
subtitles.english: Three, two, one, start!

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: Yay! You did it! 26!
subtitles.english: Yay! You did it! 26!

subtitles.original: 26 is your final number. Zeta, Level 3: 26.
subtitles.english: 26 is your final number. Zeta, Level 3: 26.

subtitles.original: No way! Yay! Wow!
subtitles.english: No way! Yay! Wow!

subtitles.original: Does this mean the scores are what I think it is?
subtitles.english: Does this mean the scores are what I think it is?

subtitles.original: I think so!
subtitles.english: I think so!

subtitles.original: Is anyone keeping score?
subtitles.english: Is anyone keeping score?

subtitles.original: The staff-san has been keeping score for us.
subtitles.english: The staff-san has been keeping score for us.

subtitles.original: Yay! You are a winner!
subtitles.english: Yay! You are a winner!

subtitles.original: I am a winner! Yeah!
subtitles.english: I am a winner! Yeah!

subtitles.original: It's all about how you feel though.
subtitles.english: It's all about how you feel though.

subtitles.original: What matters is what's inside.
subtitles.english: What matters is what's inside.

subtitles.original: Seems like you guys completed the test! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: Seems like you guys completed the test! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: Some of you were able to lift pretty well.
subtitles.english: Some of you were able to lift pretty well.

subtitles.original: Maybe not for some, though.
subtitles.english: Maybe not for some, though.

subtitles.original: It was so much fun just watching!
subtitles.english: It was so much fun just watching!

subtitles.original: But come on, Zeta. You're the birthday girl!
subtitles.english: But come on, Zeta. You're the birthday girl!

subtitles.original: You should be showing us your crazy skills!
subtitles.english: You should be showing us your crazy skills!

subtitles.original: Prove it to us next test, okay?
subtitles.english: Prove it to us next test, okay?

subtitles.original: Well then, thank you for having me!
subtitles.english: Well then, thank you for having me!

subtitles.original: This is Amelia Watson signing off.
subtitles.english: This is Amelia Watson signing off.

subtitles.original: Until next time! Bye!
subtitles.english: Until next time! Bye!

subtitles.original: She just has really high standards, okay?
subtitles.english: She just has really high standards, okay?

subtitles.original: Even if you won... not enough for her.
subtitles.english: Even if you won... not enough for her.

subtitles.original: She is a detective after all.
subtitles.english: She is a detective after all.

subtitles.original: Everyone needs to be better! Let's go!
subtitles.english: Everyone needs to be better! Let's go!

subtitles.original: La+ Darknesss!
subtitles.english: La+ Darknesss!

subtitles.original: あいつを狙おう！
subtitles.english: Okay, let's aim at that one!

subtitles.original: Ah! Oh! Ow! Stop it!
subtitles.english: Ah! Oh! Ow! Stop it!

subtitles.original: She fell down! No! Help!
subtitles.english: She fell down! No! Help!

subtitles.original: Stop it! This is scary!
subtitles.english: Stop it! This is scary!

subtitles.original: It's too much! Stop!
subtitles.english: It's too much! Stop!

subtitles.original: Level 1 clear!
subtitles.english: Level 1 clear!

subtitles.original: Level 2! No way!
subtitles.english: Level 2! No way!

subtitles.original: Tokoyami Towa! So fun, so fun!
subtitles.english: Tokoyami Towa! So fun, so fun!

subtitles.original: Zeta! What? What? Why are you holding guns?
subtitles.english: Zeta! What? What? Why are you holding guns?

subtitles.original: Yay! Aim at her! No! Stop!
subtitles.english: Yay! Aim at her! No! Stop!

subtitles.original: What is this? I'm scared!
subtitles.english: What is this? I'm scared!

subtitles.original: Stop! Hold on! Hold on!
subtitles.english: Stop! Hold on! Hold on!

subtitles.original: What are you doing? No!
subtitles.english: What are you doing? No!

subtitles.original: どういうこと？誰か説明して〜
subtitles.english: What do you mean? Someone explain!

subtitles.original: Bokobokobo~ Kobo Kanaeru at your service!
subtitles.english: Bokobokobo~ Kobo Kanaeru at your service!

subtitles.original: Let me be your sun to shine your day! Ehe!
subtitles.english: Let me be your sun to shine your day! Ehe!

subtitles.original: Zeta, happy birthday! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Zeta, happy birthday! Thank you!

subtitles.original: I already told them what to do before you came here.
subtitles.english: I already told them what to do before you came here.

subtitles.original: We're gonna be testing your aim with this water gun!
subtitles.english: We're gonna be testing your aim with this water gun!

subtitles.original: In shooting level 1, we will see how many targets you hit!
subtitles.english: In shooting level 1, we will see how many targets you hit!

subtitles.original: In level 2, we see how many moving targets you hit!
subtitles.english: In level 2, we see how many moving targets you hit!

subtitles.original: And level 3 will test you against a moving zombie!
subtitles.english: And level 3 will test you against a moving zombie!

subtitles.original: Who do you think is the best shooter here?
subtitles.english: Who do you think is the best shooter here?

subtitles.original: Me! Me! Me!
subtitles.english: Me! Me! Me!

subtitles.original: We all play FPS, so... That's right!
subtitles.english: We all play FPS, so... That's right!

subtitles.original: I don't play it though! Haha!
subtitles.english: I don't play it though! Haha!
